---
title: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
---

# Andrés Gutiérrez

Welcome to my personal website.

I am a statistician working on household surveys, official statistics, small area estimation, poverty measurement, and social data analysis.

## Areas of work

- Household surveys
- Survey sampling
- Small area estimation
- Multilevel models
- Poverty measurement
- Data analysis with R

## About this site

This website gathers information about my publications, projects, teaching activities, and technical materials.
